calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-13-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Winston Ashmeade appearing for petitioner Michelle Friedman. Counsel reported to Court that all beneficiaries received distribution. He presents a letter from the Bonding Company stating the sale proceeds will have to go into counsel's trust account. With no objection, Court is approving the petition. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
